description: Registry item manifest — lists components, layouts, and assets needed from Rocketing registries. This file is populated before the starter is cloned, based on the app's requirements from earlier pipeline phases.

layouts.name: marketing-layout
layouts.notes: Public marketing page layout with header/footer

layouts.name: dashboard
layouts.notes: Dashboard layout with stat cards and recent items

chatkit._description: ChatKit registry items that compose the AI assistant instance. The archetype determines which agent and prompt template to use. Tools, skills, widgets, and workflows are additive — Phase 8 agents select from available items based on the app's domain.

archetype.notes: Set by Phase 4 (brandKernel) based on sector1_domainArchetype. Determines the base agent and prompt.

agents.notes: Resolved from archetype. One of: chatkit-role-coach, chatkit-document-builder, chatkit-marketing-analyst, chatkit-industry-advisor, chatkit-personal-companion

prompts.notes: Resolved from archetype. One of: system-role-coach, system-document-builder, system-marketing-analyst, system-industry-advisor, system-personal-companion

tools.name: search-knowledge-base
tools.notes: Core tool — all archetypes. Searches app-specific content.

tools.name: query-database
tools.notes: Core tool — most archetypes. Queries app data for the assistant.

skills.name: summarize-content
skills.notes: Core skill — all archetypes. Summarizes long content for users.

skills.name: classify-intent
skills.notes: Core skill — role-coach, document-builder, marketing-analyst. Routes user intent.

skills.name: research-topic
skills.notes: Core skill — role-coach, marketing-analyst, industry-advisor, personal-companion.

_instructions: Agents should check item status. 'pending' = not yet installed. 'installed' = available in the codebase. 'skipped' = not needed. Update status as items are resolved. For chatkit items, the archetype.selected field determines which agent/prompt to resolve — null means not yet assigned by the cascade pipeline.
